CustomField.description: Server-side gate for production org scans. startScan() throws SecScanException if IsSandbox=false AND this flag is false. Secure default = deny. Admin must explicitly opt in before any production scan.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Server-side gate. Must be checked (true) before startScan() will proceed in a production org. Default: unchecked (false). Edit this record to enable production scanning.
CustomField.label: Allow Production Scan
